nameMeanings.name: Edel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In Germanic mythology this name is a variant of Etzel, apparently derived from adal ‘noble’, or else from the nickname Atta ‘father’. In modern times its best-known bearer was Edsel Ford , son of Henry Ford , founder of the Ford Motor Corporation. The family was partly of Dutch or Flemish descent, but the reason for the choice of given name is not known.

en.lifeSummary: Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee was born before 1275, in Viborg, Denmark as the daughter of Peder Lauridsen and NN Andersdatter. She had at least 11 sons and 2 daughters with Peder Jacobsen Skram. She died in Denmark.

ko.lifeSummary: Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee(은)는 1275년 이전 덴마크 비볼그에서 Peder Lauridsen(와)과 NN Andersdatter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Peder Jacobsen Skram(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 덴마크에서 사망했다.
